{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Lirial
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Grandmaster}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial Travelers]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|leader}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Grandmaster [[Lirial]] is a high-ranking official and a [[Territory]] whose primary abilities center on the collection, preservation, and surveillance of information rather than direct combat. Historically, [[Lirial Travelers]] served as sentinels and scouts for the [[Elysian]] [[Travelers]]. As a Grandmaster, [[Lirial]] maintains a council room in [[Enosh]], accessible via [[Lirial]] [[Gates]] that shift locations based on the movements of the moons. This individual possesses an artificial voice and wears a mask of silver ribbons, though their gender remains unknown to others. [[Lirial]] is capable of using crystal lenses to observe distant events and can deploy crystal probes for communication or observation. While not naturally destructive, [[Lirial]] can utilize star-nets and mixtures of white light and crystals to attack. The Grandmaster has also demonstrated the ability to use [[Lirial]] powers to seal or immobilize targets.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Grandmaster [[Lirial]] serves as the mysterious leader of the [[Lirial Travelers]]. This Grandmaster appears as a figure wrapped in silver and speaks with a voice resembling a toneless buzz. Acting as a potential source of interference on the [[Lirial]] side, [[Lirial]] utilizes a crystal lens to observe [[Alin]] and his sisters.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Lirial]] is a silver-wrapped figure whose voice sounds like a toneless buzz.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial]] is a Grandmaster.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Lirial]] is the mysterious leader of the [[Lirial Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Lirial]] is a potential source of interference on the [[Lirial]] side.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Lirial]] uses a crystal lens to observe [[Alin]] and his sisters.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Lirial]] believed [[Leah]] was a scared natural [[Traveler]] from the villages.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"I suspect Grandmaster Lirial or one of her lieutenants has created interference on the Lirial side."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Lirial Travelers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
